name_en: Premium Factory Leather M25903 Black Mini This Capucines mini bag draws inspiration from Baroque jewelry, incorporating shell Monogram floral decorations on the chain to reflect the dynamic style of the new Daydream series. Taurillon calfskin creates an exquisite structure, with the flap either open or closed. Removable shoulder strap for flexible carrying. Dimensions: 21 × 14 × 8 cm
